Add a glam twist to your space with the round nest of Tables. These metal coffee table set of 2 are circular with glass table tops. Perfect for entertaining, this side table set is smartly sized and designed to "nest" when not in use to maximize your space. These trendy nesting tables can be easily placed around your space where they're needed.

Features:

  • On-trend and practical, our side table will give your home an update in style.
  • It can easily be used as a side table in your living room, a nightstand in your bedroom, or a nifty work surface wherever needed.
  • With a seamless blend of urban industrial, modern, contemporary, and transitional style, you can see how this side table will work with just about any room’s current aesthetic.
